mainEntity.name: What is the most profitable crop in Stardew Valley?

acceptedAnswer.text: Starfruit and Ancient Fruit are the most profitable crops. Starfruit yields 2,250g per fruit (with Tiller profession) and Ancient Fruit produces 550g every 7 days. Hops processed into Pale Ale yields 420g per day per plant.

mainEntity.name: How do I start making money in Stardew Valley Year 1?

acceptedAnswer.text: Spring: plant 80+ parsnips, fish for income, save 2,000g for Strawberries at Egg Festival. Summer: Blueberries and Hops. Fall: Cranberries and Pumpkins. Invest in backpack upgrades and coop.

mainEntity.name: How do I unlock Ginger Island?

acceptedAnswer.text: Complete the Community Center, repair the boat after Willy's shop with 200 Hardwood, 5 Battery Packs, and 5 Iridium Bars.

mainEntity.name: What is the best crop in Farming Simulator 25?

acceptedAnswer.text: Soybeans offer highest profit per acre. Sugarcane and Poplar have highest total revenue but need specialized equipment. Beginners: start with Canola and Wheat.

mainEntity.name: How do I make money in Palia?

acceptedAnswer.text: Farm Tomatoes and Bok Choy for consistent income. Hunt Sernuks for meat and leather. Fish in Bahari Bay at dawn/dusk. Mine Pallium nodes for high-value crafts.
